message:
feat(tools,config,guard,storage): refine tool implementations, config, guard logic, and storage

Cross-cutting improvements to the tool layer, configuration, guard, and
storage subsystems:

Config (config.rs, +53/-lines):
- Expand configuration options for search tuning parameters
- Add new guard-related configuration knobs

Guard (guard.rs, +49/-lines):
- Refine pre-commit guard conflict detection logic
- Improve reservation overlap checking accuracy

Tools core (tools/lib.rs):
- Update tool registration and dispatch refinements

Messaging (tools/messaging.rs):
- Adjust message delivery validation

Reservations (tools/reservations.rs):
- Refine reservation path pattern matching

Search (tools/search.rs, +37/-lines):
- Improve search result ranking and filter application
- Better handling of FTS5 query edge cases

Storage (storage/lib.rs, +34/-lines):
- Expand archive write operations for new metadata fields
- Improve error handling in storage operations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
